testcase.name: test_admin_login_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py:181: in test_admin_login_success assert data["user"]["role"] in ["admin", "super_admin"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'user'

testcase.name: test_me_returns_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'email' in {'address': {'city': 'Test City', 'country': 'GB', 'customer_id': '0be90bfa-57e4-4c94-b5c5-88b59601c260', 'id': 'bed71923-eb69-42cc-9bdc-2d51d5b8ac82', ...}, 'customer': {'allow_bank_transfer': True, 'allow_card_payment': True, 'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'created_at': '2026-02-20T02:59:54.026607+00:00', ...}, 'user': {'company_name': 'Automate Accounts', 'email': 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'full_name': 'Test User Updated', 'id': 'ef402b8d-5400-4fd7-b972-3ae32c3d6f75', ...}}

testcase.name: test_customers_search_filter

failure.message: assert False + where False = any(<generator object TestAdminCustomers.test_customers_search_filter.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xff2e4fc145e0>)

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py:340: in test_customers_search_filter assert any("TEST_seed" in c.get("full_name", "") or "TEST_seed" in c.get("email", "") for c in customers) E assert False E + where False = any(<generator object TestAdminCustomers.test_customers_search_filter.<locals>.<genexpr> at 0xff2e4fc145e0>)

testcase.name: test_promo_codes_list
testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py:807: in test_promo_codes_list assert "codes" in r.json() E AssertionError: assert 'codes' in {'page': 1, 'per_page': 20, 'promo_codes': [{'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'ZOHOR', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:18:19.446695+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TESTZOHOR', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:18:19.325271+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'all', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TESTFIX123', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:04:45.454997+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TEST3A15F6', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T23:37:57.585592+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TESTA532CC', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T23:36:40.999473+00:00', ...}, {'applicable_checkout_types': ['one_time', 'subscription'], 'code': 'ZOHOR-TEST', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T16:06:48.832204+00:00', 'description': 'Test ZOHOR promo code', ...}, ...], 'total': 12, ...} E + where {'page': 1, 'per_page': 20, 'promo_codes': [{'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'ZOHOR', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:18:19.446695+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TESTZOHOR', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:18:19.325271+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'all', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TESTFIX123', 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:04:45.454997+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TEST3A15F6', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T23:37:57.585592+00:00', ...}, {'applies_to': 'both', 'applies_to_products': 'all', 'code': 'TESTA532CC', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T23:36:40.999473+00:00', ...}, {'applicable_checkout_types': ['one_time', 'subscription'], 'code': 'ZOHOR-TEST', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T16:06:48.832204+00:00', 'description': 'Test ZOHOR promo code', ...}, ...], 'total': 12, ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.name: test_quote_requests_list
testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py:913: in test_quote_requests_list assert "quote_requests" in r.json() E AssertionError: assert 'quote_requests' in {'page': 1, 'per_page': 20, 'quotes': [{'company': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:18:20.100251+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': '', ...}, {'company': 'UI Test Company 13', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:17:52.428189+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'uitest_quote13@test.com', ...}, {'company': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:14:06.284900+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'test_min_iter13@example.com', ...}, {'company': 'Test Company Iter13', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:14:05.818078+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'test_iter13@example.com', ...}, {'company': 'ACME', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:11:56.451691+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'test@example.com', ...}], 'total': 5, ...} E + where {'page': 1, 'per_page': 20, 'quotes': [{'company': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-22T00:18:20.100251+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': '', ...}, {'company': 'UI Test Company 13', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:17:52.428189+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'uitest_quote13@test.com', ...}, {'company': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:14:06.284900+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'test_min_iter13@example.com', ...}, {'company': 'Test Company Iter13', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:14:05.818078+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'test_iter13@example.com', ...}, {'company': 'ACME', 'created_at': '2026-02-21T07:11:56.451691+00:00', 'created_by_admin': True, 'email': 'test@example.com', ...}], 'total': 5, ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.name: test_audit_log_for_customer_created
testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py:1146: in test_audit_log_for_customer_created assert r.status_code in [200, 201, 400] # 400 if already exists ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E assert 422 in [200, 201, 400] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
